summary: Frontend-only regression for ASN×PDI integration passed all requested flows. Verified: Dispatch List has new PDI column (position 9, between Status and Review). GEW-MD-00040 shows emerald 'PDI-0012' badge; clicking opens md-pdi-panel with Report No=PDI-0012, Generated=2026-07-15 07:47, Template Revision=r4, Inspector=Sunil Verma, Approver=S. Grewal, Upload Status='Uploaded to Portal', Last Upload=2026-07-15 07:49. Preview button opens PDF iframe. Regenerate produced toast 'PDI regenerated with fresh observations' and PDI-0012 row in Reports history now shows 'regenerated ×1'. Settings > Masters shows document-types-panel with 7 types (PDI first-party, all Required-for-ASN=checked). MTC active toggle flips (unchecked→checked→unchecked). Added new 'UI Test Cert' with key UI_TEST_CERT and toggled it to inactive. ASN module page loads and asn-table shows the Completed record with ASN26486721 and 'PDI-0012.pdf'. AI PDI Generator has 3 tabs (Generate/Reports/Template Library). Reports dashboard shows PENDING PDI / COMPLETED PDI (=2) KPIs.

integration_issues.issue: Dispatch already had PDI-0013 attached (main-agent's prior E2E generated it), so the '+ PDI' generate-mode UI on 00007 could NOT be re-tested in this run. Panel opens in has_pdi mode but Inspector='—' and Approver='—' (no names captured on that backend curl-generated report). Upload Status='Pending Upload' (expected — 00007 has no ASN record). Consider seeding a fresh dispatch without a PDI so the generate flow is retest-able.

action_items: OPTIONAL: seed one Master Dispatch without pdi_report_id so the '+ PDI' generate flow (template auto-match + inspector/approver select + lot input + Generate & Attach) remains reproducible for future regressions.

OPTIONAL: when a PDI is attached via backend curl without inspector/approver fields (as happened on GEW-MD-00007), consider defaulting to '—' vs pulling last-used values so the panel doesn't show empty roles. Cosmetic only.
critical_code_review_comments: PdiPanel: preview iframe uses relative pdfUrl `/pdi/reports/{id}/pdf` — confirm PdfPreviewDialog prefixes REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL / axios baseURL (works in this env; flagging for review).
MDRecordsTable PDI column: button wraps a Badge with no keyboard focus ring styling — consider adding focus-visible ring for a11y.
DocumentTypesPanel: no delete endpoint; inactive types remain visible in list forever. Add filter toggle or a soft-delete UI for hygiene.

success_rate.frontend: 100% of requested flows testable in current state (6/7 fully verified; generate-mode on 00007 skipped because state already had PDI)

seed_data_creation: Added document type UI_TEST_CERT (label 'UI Test Cert') via Settings > Masters and left it in INACTIVE state as instructed (no delete endpoint). MTC was already in inactive state at test start (likely from earlier iteration) and left inactive after off→on→off toggle test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Only 2 Master Dispatch records exist (GEW-MD-00040 and GEW-MD-00007), BOTH now have PDIs attached (PDI-0012 rev 4 and PDI-0013 rev 4). To retest '+ PDI' generate-mode, seed a fresh dispatch without pdi_report_id. Doc-types-panel exposes 7+ types; UI_TEST_CERT was added by this iteration and left inactive. ASN26486721 is the only ASN record and it's COMPLETED with PDI-0012.pdf attached. PDI-0012 report currently has status 'regenerated' (from this iteration's regenerate click).
